title: Watch the video: How is artificial intelligence used in warfare right now?

content:

title: Pentagon feud with Anthropic shines light on AI’s role in mass surveillance
description: Anthropic PBC’s clash with the Pentagon is drawing fresh attention to a lightly regulated practice: the U.S. government’s purchase of commercially available information, such as browsing histories and location data, and the growing use of artificial intelligence to analyze it at scale. U.S. agencies, including the Defense Department, have purchased data from brokers who repackage information ...

title: Rahul Gandhi says 'Kerala Story-2' not being watched is 'good news'
description: Congress leader Rahul Gandhi commented on the movie 'Kerala Story-2' and the weaponization of media. He spoke about ideological pressure on education and India's position in artificial intelligence. Gandhi also discussed geopolitical conflicts in West Asia and their impact on India. He emphasized diversity as India's strength.
